conservative.name: Shadowcloak
conservative.requirements:
3 power
If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: You become shrouded in shadow and may immediately perform 1 free manoeuvre. The shadows conceal you from prying eyes while this card is recharging. If you are in concealment when the spell faces, at the GM's discretion you may make a Stealth (Ag) test to remain hidden

bane.description: The spell leaves black motes of shadow floating in the air for several minutes. While these are not traceable to your exact location, they are clear evidence that a spell has been cast in the area
